docs.title: ITS Ontology for Location Referencing
docs.text:
The ITS Ontology for Location Referencing consists of the following patterns:

  • Area
  • Core
  • Itinerary
  • Linear
  • Point

The formal definition of this ontology is available in TURTLE Syntax.

docs.title: AreaByCircle
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a circle.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaByCircle AreaByCircle AreaByCircle->AreaRepresentation cdm1_Length cdm1:Length AreaByCircle->cdm1_Length radius PointLocation PointLocation AreaByCircle->PointLocation hasCenter

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByCircle
docs.text: Property Constraint hasCenter only PointLocation radius only cdm1:Length subClassOf AreaRepresentation

docs.title: AreaByCode
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation LocationCode LocationCode AreaByCode AreaByCode AreaByCode->AreaRepresentation AreaByCode->LocationCode

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf AreaRepresentation subClassOf LocationCode

docs.title: AreaByGrid
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaByRectangle AreaByRectangle AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaByGrid AreaByGrid numColumns : xsd:nonNegativeInteger numRows : xsd:nonNegativeInteger AreaByGrid->AreaByRectangle AreaByGrid->AreaRepresentation

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByGrid
docs.text: Property Constraint numColumns datatype xsd:nonNegativeInteger numRows datatype xsd:nonNegativeInteger subClassOf AreaRepresentation subClassOf AreaByRectangle

docs.title: AreaByLinearBoundaries
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a set of linear boundary representations.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaByLinearBoundaries AreaByLinearBoundaries AreaByLinearBoundaries->AreaRepresentation LinearLocation LinearLocation AreaByLinearBoundaries->LinearLocation hasLinearBoundary 1..*

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByLinearBoundaries
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLinearBoundary min 1 LinearLocation subClassOf AreaRepresentation

docs.title: AreaByMultiPolygon
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a MultiPolygon geometry.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation sf_MultiPolygon sf:MultiPolygon AreaByMultiPolygon AreaByMultiPolygon AreaByMultiPolygon->AreaRepresentation AreaByMultiPolygon->sf_MultiPolygon

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByMultiPolygon
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf AreaRepresentation subClassOf sf:MultiPolygon

docs.title: AreaByPolygon
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a Polygon geometry.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation sf_Polygon sf:Polygon AreaByPolygon AreaByPolygon AreaByPolygon->AreaRepresentation AreaByPolygon->sf_Polygon

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByPolygon
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf AreaRepresentation subClassOf sf:Polygon

docs.title: AreaByRectangle
docs.text: An area representation encoded as a rectangle, defined by a lower-left corner and an upper-right corner.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaByRectangle AreaByRectangle AreaByRectangle->AreaRepresentation PointLocation PointLocation AreaByRectangle->PointLocation hasLowerLeft AreaByRectangle->PointLocation hasUpperRight

docs.title: Specializations of AreaByRectangle
docs.text: Class Description Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows).

docs.title: Formalization for AreaByRectangle
docs.text: Property Constraint hasLowerLeft only PointLocation hasUpperRight only PointLocation subClassOf AreaRepresentation

docs.title: AreaLocation
docs.text: A spatial location enclosed within a two-dimensional boundary or boundaries across a defined surface.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Location Location AreaLocation AreaLocation AreaLocation->Location AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaLocation->AreaRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation AreaLocation->AreaRepresentation hasAlternativeRepresentation

docs.title: Formalization for AreaLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint hasAlternativeRepresentation only AreaRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation only AreaRepresentation subClassOf Location

docs.title: ITS Area Referencing
docs.text:
Methodology module for area-based locations and area location representations.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/LinearPattern
  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/LocationCorePattern

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Area By Circle
  • Area By Code
  • Area By Grid
  • Area By Linear Boundaries
  • Area By Multi Polygon
  • Area By Polygon
  • Area By Rectangle
  • Area Location
  • Area Representation

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: AreaRepresentation
docs.text:
A geometry/representation that encodes an area location using a specific method.

NOTE: The boundary can consist of a single curvilinear line (e.g. a circle) or multiple curvilinear lines (e.g. the boundaries of city limits) and can consist of multiple enclosed areas.

EXAMPLE: The British Isles.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Geometry Geometry AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation AreaRepresentation->Geometry

docs.title: Specializations of AreaRepresentation
docs.text: Class Description Area By Circle An area representation encoded as a circle. Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Linear Boundaries An area representation encoded as a set of linear boundary representations. Area By Multi Polygon An area representation encoded as a MultiPolygon geometry. Area By Polygon An area representation encoded as a Polygon geometry. Area By Rectangle An area representation encoded as a rectangle, defined by a lower-left corner and an upper-right corner.

docs.title: Formalization for AreaRepresentation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Geometry

docs.title: CoordinateGeometry
docs.text: A geometry that is represented by a coordinate system (i.e., directly encodes coordinate tuples).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Geometry Geometry CoordinateGeometry CoordinateGeometry coordinateEpoch : xsd:dateTime CoordinateGeometry->Geometry CoordinateReferenceSystem CoordinateReferenceSystem CoordinateGeometry->CoordinateReferenceSystem hasCRS

docs.title: Specializations of CoordinateGeometry
docs.text: Class Description Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Geo Coordinates A point location representation encoded as latitude/longitude and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point By Projected Coordinates A point location representation encoded as projected coordinates and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata.

docs.title: Formalization for CoordinateGeometry
docs.text: Property Constraint coordinateEpoch datatype xsd:dateTime hasCRS only CoordinateReferenceSystem subClassOf Geometry

docs.title: CoordinateReferenceSystem
docs.text: A coordinate reference system (CRS) used to interpret coordinate tuples in a CoordinateGeometry. Typically identified using an OGC CRS IRI such as http://www.opengis.net/def/crs/EPSG/0/4326.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LocationThing LocationThing CoordinateReferenceSystem CoordinateReferenceSystem CoordinateReferenceSystem->LocationThing

docs.title: Formalization for CoordinateReferenceSystem
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: DistanceAccuracy
docs.text: A statement of distance accuracy for a point representation.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LocationThing LocationThing DistanceAccuracy DistanceAccuracy DistanceAccuracy->LocationThing cdm1_Length cdm1:Length DistanceAccuracy->cdm1_Length hasDistanceAccuracy cdm1_Ratio cdm1:Ratio DistanceAccuracy->cdm1_Ratio confidencePercentage MeasurementErrorCode MeasurementErrorCode DistanceAccuracy->MeasurementErrorCode distanceAccuracyErrorCode

docs.title: Specializations of DistanceAccuracy
docs.text: Class Description Elevation Accuracy A statement of elevation accuracy for a point representation. Position Accuracy A statement of positional accuracy for a point representation.

docs.title: Formalization for DistanceAccuracy
docs.text: Property Constraint confidencePercentage only cdm1:Ratio distanceAccuracyErrorCode only MeasurementErrorCode hasDistanceAccuracy only cdm1:Length subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: Elevation
docs.text: An elevation for a point location along with metadata.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LocationThing LocationThing Elevation Elevation Elevation->LocationThing cdm1_Length cdm1:Length Elevation->cdm1_Length hasElevationDistance ElevationAccuracy ElevationAccuracy Elevation->ElevationAccuracy hasElevationAccuracy ElevationHeightCode ElevationHeightCode Elevation->ElevationHeightCode hasElevationHeightCode ElevationReferenceCode ElevationReferenceCode Elevation->ElevationReferenceCode hasElevationReference

docs.title: Formalization for Elevation
docs.text: Property Constraint hasElevationAccuracy only ElevationAccuracy hasElevationDistance only cdm1:Length hasElevationHeightCode only ElevationHeightCode hasElevationReference only ElevationReferenceCode subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: ElevationAccuracy
docs.text: A statement of elevation accuracy for a point representation.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated DistanceAccuracy DistanceAccuracy ElevationAccuracy ElevationAccuracy ElevationAccuracy->DistanceAccuracy

docs.title: Formalization for ElevationAccuracy
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf DistanceAccuracy

docs.title: ElevationHeightCode
docs.text: A code that identifies the height value for an elevation value (e.g., 'ground layer 1', 'elevated layer 1', 'elevated layer 2', 'tunnel layer 1').

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code LocationThing LocationThing ElevationHeightCode ElevationHeightCode ElevationHeightCode->its-core_Code ElevationHeightCode->LocationThing

docs.title: Formalization for ElevationHeightCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: ElevationReferenceCode
docs.text: A code that identifies the reference system for an elevation value (e.g., 'ellipsoidal', 'gravityRelated', 'ground level', 'EPSG:5701', 'coded height').

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code LocationThing LocationThing ElevationReferenceCode ElevationReferenceCode ElevationReferenceCode->its-core_Code ElevationReferenceCode->LocationThing

docs.title: Formalization for ElevationReferenceCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: Feature
docs.text:
An abstraction of real-world phenomena. An ITS-domain feature (subclass of geo:Feature) used to model real-world things that have a spatial location.

NOTE: Geographic features can be defined for any geographic entity that can be defined with geospatial boundaries, such as landmarks, buildings, transport infrastructure (e.g., road, pathway, railway, bridge structures, intersections, traffic signal cabinet, traffic signal pole, waterway), jurisdictional areas (e.g., country, city), etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated geo_Feature geo:Feature SpatialObject SpatialObject Feature Feature cdm1:hasName : rdf:langString Feature->geo_Feature Feature->SpatialObject

docs.title: Specializations of Feature
docs.text: Class Description Area Location A spatial location enclosed within a two-dimensional boundary or boundaries across a defined surface. Itinerary An ordered set of multiple physically separate locations forming a route or itinerary. Linear Location A spatial location that extends between two point locations along a defined path Location A particular place or position. Location Group An unordered set of multiple physically separate locations. Point Location A spatial location with no length in any of the spatial dimensions. Spatial Location A location that is represented in three-dimensional space.

docs.title: Formalization for Feature
docs.text: Property Constraint cdm1:hasName datatype rdf:langString subClassOf SpatialObject subClassOf geo:Feature

docs.title: Geometry
docs.text: A description of a spatial location in the real world according to a defined reference system

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated geo_Geometry geo:Geometry SpatialObject SpatialObject Geometry Geometry Geometry->geo_Geometry Geometry->SpatialObject

docs.title: Specializations of Geometry
docs.text: Class Description Area By Circle An area representation encoded as a circle. Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Linear Boundaries An area representation encoded as a set of linear boundary representations. Area By Multi Polygon An area representation encoded as a MultiPolygon geometry. Area By Polygon An area representation encoded as a Polygon geometry. Area By Rectangle An area representation encoded as a rectangle, defined by a lower-left corner and an upper-right corner. Area Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an area location using a specific method. Coordinate Geometry A geometry that is represented by a coordinate system (i.e., directly encodes coordinate tuples). Itinerary By Waypoints An itinerary representation encoded as an ordered sequence of locations (waypoints). Itinerary Code An itinerary representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external itinerary/route referencing system. Itinerary Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an itinerary using a specific method. Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Linear Ring A linear representation encoded as a LinearRing geometry. Linear By Line String A linear representation encoded as a LineString geometry. Linear By Multi Line String A linear representation encoded as a MultiLineString geometry. Linear By Point Representations A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of point representations. Linear By Points A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of points. Linear Representation A geometry/representation that encodes a linear location using a specific method. Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Geo Coordinates A point location representation encoded as latitude/longitude and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point By Linear Position A point representation defined by an offset along a linear representation. Point By Projected Coordinates A point location representation encoded as projected coordinates and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point Representation A representation of a point location using a specific method (e.g., coordinates or an external code).

docs.title: Formalization for Geometry
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf SpatialObject subClassOf geo:Geometry

docs.title: Itinerary
docs.text: An ordered set of multiple physically separate locations forming a route or itinerary.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Feature Feature Itinerary Itinerary Itinerary->Feature ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryRepresentation Itinerary->ItineraryRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation Itinerary->ItineraryRepresentation hasAlternativeRepresentation

docs.title: Formalization for Itinerary
docs.text: Property Constraint hasAlternativeRepresentation only ItineraryRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation only ItineraryRepresentation subClassOf Feature

docs.title: ItineraryByWaypoints
docs.text: An itinerary representation encoded as an ordered sequence of locations (waypoints).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryByWaypoints ItineraryByWaypoints ItineraryByWaypoints->ItineraryRepresentation LocationList LocationList ItineraryByWaypoints->LocationList hasWaypointList

docs.title: Formalization for ItineraryByWaypoints
docs.text: Property Constraint hasWaypointList only LocationList subClassOf ItineraryRepresentation

docs.title: ItineraryCode
docs.text: An itinerary representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external itinerary/route referencing system.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryRepresentation its-core_Code its-core:Code ItineraryCode ItineraryCode ItineraryCode->ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for ItineraryCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf ItineraryRepresentation subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: ITS Itinerary Referencing
docs.text:
Methodology module for itineraries (ordered sets of locations) and itinerary representations.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/LocationCorePattern

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Itinerary
  • Itinerary By Waypoints
  • Itinerary Code
  • Itinerary Representation
  • Location List

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: ItineraryRepresentation
docs.text: A geometry/representation that encodes an itinerary using a specific method.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Geometry Geometry ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryRepresentation ItineraryRepresentation->Geometry

docs.title: Specializations of ItineraryRepresentation
docs.text: Class Description Itinerary By Waypoints An itinerary representation encoded as an ordered sequence of locations (waypoints). Itinerary Code An itinerary representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external itinerary/route referencing system.

docs.title: Formalization for ItineraryRepresentation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Geometry

docs.title: LinearByCode
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation LocationCode LocationCode LinearByCode LinearByCode LinearByCode->LinearRepresentation LinearByCode->LocationCode

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LinearRepresentation subClassOf LocationCode

docs.title: LinearByLineString
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as a LineString geometry.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation sf_LineString sf:LineString LinearByLineString LinearByLineString LinearByLineString->LinearRepresentation LinearByLineString->sf_LineString

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByLineString
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LinearRepresentation subClassOf sf:LineString

docs.title: LinearByLinearRing
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as a LinearRing geometry.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation sf_LinearRing sf:LinearRing LinearByLinearRing LinearByLinearRing LinearByLinearRing->LinearRepresentation LinearByLinearRing->sf_LinearRing

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByLinearRing
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LinearRepresentation subClassOf sf:LinearRing

docs.title: LinearByMultiLineString
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as a MultiLineString geometry.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation sf_MultiLineString sf:MultiLineString LinearByMultiLineString LinearByMultiLineString LinearByMultiLineString->LinearRepresentation LinearByMultiLineString->sf_MultiLineString

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByMultiLineString
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LinearRepresentation subClassOf sf:MultiLineString

docs.title: LinearByPointRepresentations
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of point representations.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation LinearByPointRepresentations LinearByPointRepresentations LinearByPointRepresentations->LinearRepresentation PointRepresentationList PointRepresentationList LinearByPointRepresentations->PointRepresentationList hasPointRepresentationList

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByPointRepresentations
docs.text: Property Constraint hasPointRepresentationList only PointRepresentationList subClassOf LinearRepresentation

docs.title: LinearByPoints
docs.text: A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of points.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation LinearByPoints LinearByPoints LinearByPoints->LinearRepresentation PointLocationList PointLocationList LinearByPoints->PointLocationList hasPointList

docs.title: Formalization for LinearByPoints
docs.text: Property Constraint hasPointList only PointLocationList subClassOf LinearRepresentation

docs.title: LinearLocation
docs.text:
A spatial location that extends between two point locations along a defined path

NOTE: The path can exhibit 3-dimensional characteristics.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Location Location LinearLocation LinearLocation LinearLocation->Location LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation LinearLocation->LinearRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation LinearLocation->LinearRepresentation hasAlternativeRepresentation

docs.title: Formalization for LinearLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint hasAlternativeRepresentation only LinearRepresentation hasPrimaryRepresentation only LinearRepresentation subClassOf Location

docs.title: ITS Linear Referencing
docs.text:
Methodology module for linear elements, linear locations, and linear location representations.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/LocationCorePattern
  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/PointPattern

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Linear By Code
  • Linear By Linear Ring
  • Linear By Line String
  • Linear By Multi Line String
  • Linear By Point Representations
  • Linear By Points
  • Linear Location
  • Linear Representation
  • Offset Distance
  • Point By Linear Position
  • Point Location List
  • Point Representation List

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: LinearRepresentation
docs.text: A geometry/representation that encodes a linear location using a specific method.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Geometry Geometry LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation LinearRepresentation->Geometry

docs.title: Specializations of LinearRepresentation
docs.text: Class Description Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Linear Ring A linear representation encoded as a LinearRing geometry. Linear By Line String A linear representation encoded as a LineString geometry. Linear By Multi Line String A linear representation encoded as a MultiLineString geometry. Linear By Point Representations A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of point representations. Linear By Points A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of points.

docs.title: Formalization for LinearRepresentation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Geometry

docs.title: Location
docs.text:
A particular place or position.

NOTE: A location is modelled as a feature, which is a spatial object with a name.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Feature Feature Location Location Location->Feature Geometry Geometry Location->Geometry hasPrimaryRepresentation Location->Geometry hasAlternativeRepresentation

docs.title: Specializations of Location
docs.text: Class Description Area Location A spatial location enclosed within a two-dimensional boundary or boundaries across a defined surface. Linear Location A spatial location that extends between two point locations along a defined path Point Location A spatial location with no length in any of the spatial dimensions.

docs.title: Formalization for Location
docs.text: Property Constraint hasAlternativeRepresentation only Geometry hasPrimaryRepresentation only Geometry subClassOf Feature

docs.title: LocationCode
docs.text: A code that identifies (or can be used to look up) a location in some external referencing system.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code LocationThing LocationThing LocationCode LocationCode LocationCode->its-core_Code LocationCode->LocationThing

docs.title: Specializations of LocationCode
docs.text: Class Description Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system.

docs.title: Formalization for LocationCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LocationThing subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: ITS Location Referencing Core
docs.text:
Core abstractions for locations, location representations, and location collections used across multiple location-referencing methodologies.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/core/v1/

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Coordinate Geometry
  • Coordinate Reference System
  • Feature
  • Geometry
  • Location
  • Location Code
  • Location Group
  • Location Thing
  • Spatial Location
  • Spatial Object

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: LocationGroup
docs.text: An unordered set of multiple physically separate locations.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Feature Feature LocationGroup LocationGroup LocationGroup->Feature Location Location LocationGroup->Location hasMember 2..*

docs.title: Formalization for LocationGroup
docs.text: Property Constraint hasMember min 2 Location subClassOf Feature

docs.title: LocationList
docs.text: An ordered list of member locations.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated rdf_List rdf:List LocationList LocationList rdf:first LocationList->rdf_List

docs.title: Formalization for LocationList
docs.text: Property Constraint rdf:first only Location subClassOf rdf:List

docs.title: LocationThing
docs.text: Parent class for location domain concepts.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LocationThing LocationThing

docs.title: Specializations of LocationThing
docs.text: Class Description Area By Circle An area representation encoded as a circle. Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Linear Boundaries An area representation encoded as a set of linear boundary representations. Area By Multi Polygon An area representation encoded as a MultiPolygon geometry. Area By Polygon An area representation encoded as a Polygon geometry. Area By Rectangle An area representation encoded as a rectangle, defined by a lower-left corner and an upper-right corner. Area Location A spatial location enclosed within a two-dimensional boundary or boundaries across a defined surface. Area Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an area location using a specific method. Coordinate Geometry A geometry that is represented by a coordinate system (i.e., directly encodes coordinate tuples). Coordinate Reference System A coordinate reference system (CRS) used to interpret coordinate tuples in a CoordinateGeometry. Typically identified using an OGC CRS IRI such as http://www.opengis.net/def/crs/EPSG/0/4326. Distance Accuracy A statement of distance accuracy for a point representation. Elevation An elevation for a point location along with metadata. Elevation Accuracy A statement of elevation accuracy for a point representation. Elevation Height Code A code that identifies the height value for an elevation value  (e.g., 'ground layer 1', 'elevated layer 1', 'elevated layer 2', 'tunnel layer 1'). Elevation Reference Code A code that identifies the reference system for an elevation value  (e.g., 'ellipsoidal', 'gravityRelated', 'ground level', 'EPSG:5701', 'coded height'). Feature An abstraction of real-world phenomena. An ITS-domain feature (subclass of geo:Feature) used to model real-world things that have a spatial location. Geometry A description of a spatial location in the real world according to a defined reference system Itinerary An ordered set of multiple physically separate locations forming a route or itinerary. Itinerary By Waypoints An itinerary representation encoded as an ordered sequence of locations (waypoints). Itinerary Code An itinerary representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external itinerary/route referencing system. Itinerary Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an itinerary using a specific method. Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Linear Ring A linear representation encoded as a LinearRing geometry. Linear By Line String A linear representation encoded as a LineString geometry. Linear By Multi Line String A linear representation encoded as a MultiLineString geometry. Linear By Point Representations A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of point representations. Linear By Points A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of points. Linear Location A spatial location that extends between two point locations along a defined path Linear Representation A geometry/representation that encodes a linear location using a specific method. Location A particular place or position. Location Code A code that identifies (or can be used to look up) a location in some external referencing system. Location Group An unordered set of multiple physically separate locations. Measurement Error Code A code identifying an error condition or qualification for a measurement value. Offset Distance An offset distance expressed either as a length or as a percentage. Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Geo Coordinates A point location representation encoded as latitude/longitude and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point By Linear Position A point representation defined by an offset along a linear representation. Point By Projected Coordinates A point location representation encoded as projected coordinates and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point Location A spatial location with no length in any of the spatial dimensions. Point Representation A representation of a point location using a specific method (e.g., coordinates or an external code). Position Accuracy A statement of positional accuracy for a point representation. Position Confidence Ellipse A confidence ellipse describing uncertainty of a point position in a horizontal plane. Spatial Location A location that is represented in three-dimensional space. Spatial Object A spatial object within the ITS domain (subclass of geo:SpatialObject).

docs.title: ITS Point Referencing
docs.text:
A module of the ITS Location Ontology that defines concepts for point-based locations and representations of those locations.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/location/v1/LocationCorePattern

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Distance Accuracy
  • Elevation
  • Elevation Accuracy
  • Elevation Height Code
  • Elevation Reference Code
  • Measurement Error Code
  • Point By Code
  • Point By Coordinates
  • Point By Geo Coordinates
  • Point By Projected Coordinates
  • Point Location
  • Point Representation
  • Position Accuracy
  • Position Confidence Ellipse

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: PointRepresentation
docs.text: A representation of a point location using a specific method (e.g., coordinates or an external code).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Geometry Geometry PointRepresentation PointRepresentation PointRepresentation->Geometry

docs.title: Specializations of PointRepresentation
docs.text: Class Description Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Geo Coordinates A point location representation encoded as latitude/longitude and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point By Linear Position A point representation defined by an offset along a linear representation. Point By Projected Coordinates A point location representation encoded as projected coordinates and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata.

docs.title: Formalization for PointRepresentation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Geometry

docs.title: PointRepresentationList
docs.text: An ordered list of member point representations.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated rdf_List rdf:List PointRepresentationList PointRepresentationList rdf:first PointRepresentationList->rdf_List

docs.title: Formalization for PointRepresentationList
docs.text: Property Constraint rdf:first only PointRepresentation subClassOf rdf:List

SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated LocationThing LocationThing PositionConfidenceEllipse PositionConfidenceEllipse PositionConfidenceEllipse->LocationThing cdm1_Length cdm1:Length PositionConfidenceEllipse->cdm1_Length semiMajorAxisLength PositionConfidenceEllipse->cdm1_Length semiMinorAxisLength its-core_Bearing its-core:Bearing PositionConfidenceEllipse->its-core_Bearing semiMajorAxisOrientation MeasurementErrorCode MeasurementErrorCode PositionConfidenceEllipse->MeasurementErrorCode semiMajorAxisLengthErrorCode PositionConfidenceEllipse->MeasurementErrorCode semiMinorAxisLengthErrorCode PositionConfidenceEllipse->MeasurementErrorCode semiMajorAxisOrientationErrorCode

docs.title: Formalization for PositionConfidenceEllipse
docs.text: Property Constraint semiMajorAxisLength only cdm1:Length semiMajorAxisLengthErrorCode only MeasurementErrorCode semiMajorAxisOrientation only its-core:Bearing semiMajorAxisOrientationErrorCode only MeasurementErrorCode semiMinorAxisLength only cdm1:Length semiMinorAxisLengthErrorCode only MeasurementErrorCode subClassOf LocationThing

docs.title: SpatialLocation
docs.text:
A location that is represented in three-dimensional space.

NOTE: The 'location' could be a point (consuming no space) or could consume space in one, two or three dimensions. In any case, the location is identified within a larger space.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Feature Feature SpatialLocation SpatialLocation SpatialLocation->Feature

docs.title: Formalization for SpatialLocation
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Feature

docs.title: SpatialObject
docs.text: A spatial object within the ITS domain (subclass of geo:SpatialObject).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated geo_SpatialObject geo:SpatialObject LocationThing LocationThing SpatialObject SpatialObject SpatialObject->geo_SpatialObject SpatialObject->LocationThing

docs.title: Specializations of SpatialObject
docs.text: Class Description Area By Circle An area representation encoded as a circle. Area By Code An area representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Grid An area representation encoded as a grid. The rectangle defined by lower-left and upper-right is the base cell, which is replicated eastward (columns) and northward (rows). Area By Linear Boundaries An area representation encoded as a set of linear boundary representations. Area By Multi Polygon An area representation encoded as a MultiPolygon geometry. Area By Polygon An area representation encoded as a Polygon geometry. Area By Rectangle An area representation encoded as a rectangle, defined by a lower-left corner and an upper-right corner. Area Location A spatial location enclosed within a two-dimensional boundary or boundaries across a defined surface. Area Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an area location using a specific method. Coordinate Geometry A geometry that is represented by a coordinate system (i.e., directly encodes coordinate tuples). Feature An abstraction of real-world phenomena. An ITS-domain feature (subclass of geo:Feature) used to model real-world things that have a spatial location. Geometry A description of a spatial location in the real world according to a defined reference system Itinerary An ordered set of multiple physically separate locations forming a route or itinerary. Itinerary By Waypoints An itinerary representation encoded as an ordered sequence of locations (waypoints). Itinerary Code An itinerary representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external itinerary/route referencing system. Itinerary Representation A geometry/representation that encodes an itinerary using a specific method. Linear By Code A linear representation encoded as a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Linear By Linear Ring A linear representation encoded as a LinearRing geometry. Linear By Line String A linear representation encoded as a LineString geometry. Linear By Multi Line String A linear representation encoded as a MultiLineString geometry. Linear By Point Representations A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of point representations. Linear By Points A linear representation encoded as an ordered sequence of points. Linear Location A spatial location that extends between two point locations along a defined path Linear Representation A geometry/representation that encodes a linear location using a specific method. Location A particular place or position. Location Group An unordered set of multiple physically separate locations. Point By Code A point location representation using a code that references an entry in an external location referencing system. Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Coordinates A coordinate tuple defining the geodetic position of a single point location using a known geodetic reference system Point By Geo Coordinates A point location representation encoded as latitude/longitude and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point By Linear Position A point representation defined by an offset along a linear representation. Point By Projected Coordinates A point location representation encoded as projected coordinates and optional elements, such as elevation and metadata. Point Location A spatial location with no length in any of the spatial dimensions. Point Representation A representation of a point location using a specific method (e.g., coordinates or an external code). Spatial Location A location that is represented in three-dimensional space.

docs.title: Formalization for SpatialObject
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf LocationThing subClassOf geo:SpatialObject

docs.title: Standard adapters (scaffold)
docs.text:
This directory is reserved for standard-specific adapter modules that align external standards (e.g., Alert-C, OpenLR, TPEG) to the methodology modules in ../.

Adapters should prefer: - subclassing / equivalence axioms - annotation provenance and mapping notes - controlled enumerations where required Adapters should avoid duplicating shared primitives (coordinates, geometry, quality, external IDs).
